trending_themes.evidence: Released 12th mini album 'MOTTO' May 18; title track about devotion and diving in; 8 tracks with 5 member solo tracks
Tokyo concerts May 9-10; Seoul shows Feb 13-15; Australia/New Zealand expansion confirmed
Confirmed headliners for Morocco's Mawazine music festival June 23, 2026 — first K-pop headliner at this festival

annotation_hooks: JYP's self-confidence ethos (introduced with 'DALLA DALLA') reaches maturation in MOTTO — annotations can trace this lyrical through-line
Individual member solo tracks create rich annotation territory for personality-specific interpretations
Mawazine headlining reflects K-pop's penetration into global music festival circuit
raw_headlines: ITZY releases MOTTO 12th mini album May 18
